scripts.build: DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-${POSTGRES_PRISMA_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING:-}}}} DIRECT_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING:-${POSTGRES_URL:-}}} prisma generate && if [ -n "${DATABASE_URL:-${POSTGRES_PRISMA_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING:-}}}}" ]; then DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:-${POSTGRES_PRISMA_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING:-}}}} DIRECT_URL=${DIRECT_URL:-${POSTGRES_URL_NON_POOLING:-${POSTGRES_URL:-}}} prisma migrate deploy; else echo 'Skipping prisma migrate deploy because DATABASE_URL is not set'; fi && next build
